summary: Mobile Search Page UI Refinements Testing - Batch 3 Features. ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Card declutter - heart-only on images, no share/eye icons. (2) Preview text link + Compare button at bottom of cards. (3) Quick Preview bottom sheet opens with image carousel, amenities, price, View Details button. (4) Dynamic header text 'Curated Venues' with venue/city counts. (5) Infinite scroll - 20 venues initially with 'Show more venues (N remaining)' button. (6) Recently Viewed section with 150px thumbnails after visiting venues. (7) FEATURED and ALL VENUES section labels with visual divider. (8) Compare flow still works correctly. (9) Venue cards link to correct detail pages.

tests.test: Heart icon only on card images (no share/eye icons)
Heart icon is outline style by default
Heart toggles to filled red when favorited
Preview text link at bottom-right of card
Compare button at bottom-right of card
Preview text is underlined link style
Compare button has Scale icon
Tapping Preview opens MobileQuickPreview bottom sheet
Bottom sheet has image carousel with swipe support
Image counter shows (1/5) format
Amenities shown as chips (Parking, AC, Catering, etc)
Price shown with '/plate' label
View Details button navigates to venue page
Quick Preview dismisses with X button or backdrop tap
Header shows 'Curated Venues' or 'Venues in {city}'
Count shows 'N across M cities' format
Only 20 venues shown initially
'Show more venues (N remaining)' button at bottom
Clicking Load More shows 20 more venues
Button updates remaining count after click
FEATURED section label with gold accent bar
ALL VENUES section label with divider line
Visual breathing room between sections
Recently Viewed section appears after visiting venues
Thumbnails are 150px wide
Clear button removes recently viewed history
Data stored in localStorage key 'vl_recently_viewed'
Compare button toggles to 'Added' state
Floating compare bar appears with selected venues
Compare sheet opens with side-by-side comparison
Max 3 venues limit enforced
Cards link to /venues/{city}/{venue-slug}
Clicking card navigates to correct detail page

test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for search page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile search page batch 3 improvements verified. Key data-testids: venue-card-preview-{id}, venue-card-compare-{id}, venue-card-fav-{id}, mobile-quick-preview, quick-preview-images, quick-preview-view-btn, quick-preview-close, load-more-btn, recently-viewed-mobile, featured-section-label, all-venues-section-label, compare-floating-bar, compare-now-btn. Infinite scroll uses visibleCount state (default 20). Recently Viewed stored in localStorage 'vl_recently_viewed'. MobileQuickPreview shows amenities, price, image carousel with swipe.
